2604.07298.title: Region-Graph Optimal Transport Routing for Mixture-of-Experts Whole-Slide Image Classification
2604.07298.paper_summary: Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) is the dominant framework for gigapixel whole-slide image (WSI) classification in computational pathology. However, current MIL aggregators route all instances through a shared pathway, constraining their capacity to specialise across the pathological heterogeneity inherent in each slide. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) methods offer a natural remedy by partitioning instances across specialised expert subnetworks; yet unconstrained softmax routing may yield highly imbalanced utilisation, where one or a few experts absorb most routing mass, collapsing the mixture back to a near-single-pathway solution. To address these limitations, we propose ROAM (Region-graph OptimAl-transport Mixture-of-experts), a spatially aware MoE-MIL aggregator that routes region tokens to expert poolers via capacity-constrained entropic optimal transport, promoting balanced expert utilisation by construction. ROAM operates on spatial region tokens, obtained by compressing dense patch bags into spatially binned units that align routing with local tissue neighbourhoods and introduces two key mechanisms: (i) region-to-expert assignment formulated as entropic optimal transport (Sinkhorn) with explicit per slide capacity marginals, enforcing balanced expert utilisation without auxiliary load-balancing losses; and (ii) graph-regularised Sinkhorn iterations that diffuse routing assignments over the spatial region graph, encouraging neighbouring regions to coherently route to the same experts. Evaluated on four WSI benchmarks with frozen foundation-model patch embeddings, ROAM achieves performance competitive against strong MIL and MoE baselines, and on NSCLC generalisation (TCGA-CPTAC) reaches external AUC 0.845 +- 0.019.
2604.07298.paper_summary_zh: 多實例學習（MIL）是計算病理學中用於千兆像素整張幻燈片圖像（WSI）分類的主導框架。<lb/>然而，當前的MIL聚合器將所有實例通過共享路徑進行路由，限制了它們在每張幻燈片固有的病理異質性中專業化的能力。<lb/>專家混合（MoE）方法通過將實例劃分到專門的專家子網絡中提供了一種自然的解決方案；然而，無約束的softmax路由可能導致高度不平衡的利用，其中一個或幾個專家吸收了大部分路由質量，將混合重新壓縮回接近單一路徑的解決方案。<lb/>為了解決這些限制，我們提出了ROAM（區域圖優化運輸專家混合），這是一種空間感知的MoE-MIL聚合器，通過容量受限的熵最優運輸將區域標記路由到專家池，從而促進平衡的專家利用。<lb/>ROAM在空間區域標記上運作，這些標記是通過將密集的補丁包壓縮成與當地組織鄰域對齊的空間分箱單位來獲得的，並引入了兩個關鍵機制：（i）區域到專家的分配，形式化為具有明確每張幻燈片容量邊際的熵最優運輸（Sinkhorn），在不需要輔助負載平衡損失的情況下強制實現平衡的專家利用；以及（ii）圖正則化的Sinkhorn迭代，將路由分配擴散到空間區域圖上，鼓勵相鄰區域一致地路由到相同的專家。<lb/>在四個WSI基準上進行評估，使用凍結的基礎模型補丁嵌入，ROAM的性能與強大的MIL和MoE基準相當，並且在NSCLC泛化（TCGA-CPTAC）中達到外部AUC 0.845 +- 0.019。
2604.07298.author: Xin Tian et.al.
2604.07298.authors: Xin Tian, Jiuliu Lu, Ephraim Tsalik, Bart Wanders, Colleen Knoth, Julian Knight
